evals.prompt: I have about 50 PDF invoices scattered across my Downloads folder from various vendors (Acme Corp, TechSupply Inc, etc.). I need to organize them in my MEGA encrypted vault by vendor name, then create a shareable link to the vendor folders so I can send them to my accountant. Walk me through the exact steps.
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step instructions to: (1) find/list the invoice PDFs, (2) create folder structure in MEGA by vendor, (3) organize/move files, (4) create and test share links. Should include actual MEGA CMD commands.

evals.prompt: I need to back up my entire ~/Documents folder (about 2GB with nested folders) to MEGA encrypted storage. What's the fastest and cleanest way to do this? I want to be able to verify the backup worked.
evals.expected_output: Instructions for: (1) organizing the folder locally if needed, (2) uploading with mega-put -c, (3) verifying with mega-ls, (4) explaining why this approach is best. Should address the size and complexity.

evals.prompt: I have a folder called /Contracts in MEGA with 200+ PDFs from the last 3 years. I need to find all contracts from the last 30 days, download them locally to audit them, and if everything looks good, I want to delete the older ones from MEGA to save space. How would I do this safely?
evals.expected_output: Instructions for: (1) finding files by date with mega-find, (2) downloading specific batch, (3) verifying before deletion, (4) using mega-rm safely. Should emphasize caution with destructive operations.
